orchestrator_notes: RT-3 / Enhancement #43. progress_percent in MCP response shows 0% until agents complete. The Feb report notes: 'This is NOT a UI issue — the dashboard uses todo steps (3/5, 4/5) as progress indicator, not percentages. The % is only in MCP tool responses to agents. Investigate if this even matters or is just verbose chat noise.' May close as non-issue.

sessions.title: Research: Progress Percent Calculation
planned_tasks: Read get_workflow_status() in orchestration_service.py — how is progress_percent calculated?
Read report_progress() — does it update a percentage field? Or just todo items?
Check AgentExecution model — is there a progress field? What updates it?
Trace the FULL flow: agent calls report_progress -> what happens to the progress value?
Check: does the dashboard use progress_percent? Or todo item counts?
Check: who consumes progress_percent? Orchestrator? Frontend? Both?
Determine: is 0% a bug (never updated), by-design (only set on completion), or a non-issue (nobody reads it)?
tasks_completed: Read get_workflow_status() — calculates completed_agents/actionable_agents*100 (project-level, NOT per-agent todo progress)
Read report_progress() — YES it sets execution.progress from todo_items percent calculation (completed_steps/total_steps*100)
Checked AgentExecution model — has Integer 'progress' field (0-100), updated by report_progress()
Traced full flow: report_progress -> execution.progress updated -> WebSocket broadcast includes progress_percent -> frontend stores receive it -> BUT no Vue component renders the percentage
Dashboard uses steps.completed/steps.total (e.g. 3/5) from todo_steps, NOT progress_percent
Consumers: MCP tool response (get_workflow_status), REST API, WebSocket events. Frontend stores receive but never display.
Determination: BY-DESIGN / NON-ISSUE. Both progress_percent values work correctly. Nobody renders the percentage.

two_distinct_values.project_level: get_workflow_status() calculates completed_agents / actionable_agents * 100. Goes 0% -> 25% -> 50% -> 100% as agents complete. This is CORRECT — it measures agent completion ratio, not per-todo granularity.
two_distinct_values.per_agent_level: AgentExecution.progress (Integer 0-100) is updated by report_progress() from todo_items: completed_steps/total_steps*100. Also works correctly.

who_writes_it.project_level: get_workflow_status() calculates from execution status counts (orchestration_service.py L263-266)
who_writes_it.per_agent: report_progress() sets execution.progress = int(percent) from todo_items calculation (orchestration_service.py L1394)

who_reads_it.mcp_tool_response: get_workflow_status() returns WorkflowStatus.progress_percent to orchestrator agents via MCP JSON
who_reads_it.websocket: _fetch_and_broadcast_progress() includes execution.progress as progress_percent in job:progress_update event
who_reads_it.frontend_stores: websocketEventRouter.js maps progress_percent to handleProgressUpdate() -> agentJobsStore stores it
who_reads_it.frontend_display: NONE — no Vue component renders progress_percent. Dashboard shows steps.completed/steps.total (e.g. 3/5)

findings.why_0_percent_observed: The RT-3 reporter saw 0% from get_workflow_status() when zero agents were complete. This is mathematically correct: 0/4*100 = 0%. It jumped to 25% when 1/4 completed, as confirmed in the Jan 2nd test run log.
findings.recommendation: Close RT-3 / Enhancement #43. No code changes needed. Both progress_percent calculations are correct. The value flows through the system but is never displayed to users — the dashboard uses the superior steps format (3/5, 4/5) instead.

files_investigated: src/giljo_mcp/services/orchestration_service.py (get_workflow_status L188-355, report_progress L1278-1506, _fetch_and_broadcast_progress L1508-1557, list_jobs L1998-2171)
api/endpoints/mcp_http.py (MCP tool definitions and response serialization L985-988)
frontend/src/components/projects/JobsTab.vue (Steps display L108-121 — uses steps, NOT progress_percent)
sessions.notes_for_next: No 0805b session needed. Recommend closing RT-3/#43 as non-issue. If product owner wants the dashboard to show a percentage progress bar in the future, the data is already flowing correctly — only a Vue component change would be needed.
sessions.summary: Thorough investigation confirms progress_percent is NOT a bug. Two values exist: (1) project-level agent completion ratio in get_workflow_status() and (2) per-agent todo completion in execution.progress. Both calculate correctly. The dashboard intentionally displays steps (3/5) instead of percentages. The 0% observation was correct math (0 of N agents complete). Recommend closing RT-3/#43.

sessions.title: Implement: Progress Percent Fix
deviations: Cancelled — research found no bug. No fix needed.
sessions.summary: Not needed. 0805a research determined this is not a bug.

chain_summary: RT-3/#43 investigated and confirmed as non-issue. progress_percent works correctly at both project and per-agent levels. Dashboard intentionally uses steps (3/5) format. No code changes needed. Recommend closing the enhancement ticket.
